evaluation.comments: Boundary review only: one admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro call was made with thinking enabled per the Goal 15A admission update, stream=false, no tools, no model substitution, no retry, the approved third-source hash, and the 12000-token cap. The completion finished naturally with reasoning and content tokens recorded separately. The model emitted line-range locator candidates only, respected the entry caps, and did not emit character offsets or quote hashes; local offsets and quote hashes were computed only after strict line-range validation. Spend stayed far below the $3 cap. Raw source text, provider payloads, prompt traces, model traces, reasoning traces, and secrets are not committed. The output is proposal-only and method quality was not evaluated by this boundary record.
